name: @sparx/email-worker
description: Sparx email worker. Receives email.send events via Pub/Sub push (Cloud Run HTTP entrypoint), renders React Email templates from @sparx/email, and hands the rendered payload to that package's provider (console in dev, Postal in prod). Falls back to console transport when POSTAL_API_KEY is unset so the worker is usable end-to-end before Postal is deployed.
